findings.description: The source file contains 'View(JSP)の作成' as a separate heading at the same level (= underline) as 'リクエストに対応するメソッドの作成', but the knowledge file merges its content into s2 without giving it its own section. Per V3 rules, equal-level source headings should produce separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: 'View(JSP)の作成' underlined with '==================================================', same character as 'リクエストに対応するメソッドの作成' heading.

findings.description: `getParameterizedSqlStatement` is a key method name that appears in both the note block and the alternative Java code example in s1, but is absent from s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source note: 'getParameterizedSqlStatementの第2引数(上記のサンプルではcondition)とretrieveの引数(同じくcondition)は、両方に同じインスタンスを渡すこと。' and the accompanying code block using `getParameterizedSqlStatement`.
